response: A user wants to deposit a $2,500 bonus cheque into their high-rate savings account that pays interest of 3.15%. Interest is calculated on the daily closing balance and paid at the close of business on the last day of the month. If the user's current balance is $9,055 and they do not make any withdrawals, what interest will they earn on their savings account for the month of March by depositing the cheque on March 11? (Use 365 days a year. Do not round intermediate calculations and round your final answer to 2 decimal places.)
